ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmarking result */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Number of elements in the benchmarking test */,
  "blocks_per_grid" INTEGER /* Number of blocks per grid in the benchmarking test */,
  "threads_per_block" INTEGER /* Number of threads per block in the benchmarking test */,
  "time_cpu" REAL /* Time taken by the CPU to complete the benchmarking test */,
  "time_gpu" REAL /* Time taken by the GPU to complete the benchmarking test */,
  "gflops_cpu" REAL /* GFLOPS (gigaflops) achieved by the CPU in the benchmarking test */,
  "gflops_gpu" REAL /* GFLOPS (gigaflops) achieved by the GPU in the benchmarking test */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption of the system during the benchmarking test */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the GPU during the benchmarking test */,
  "fan_speed" INTEGER /* Fan speed of the system during the benchmarking test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpu_architectures" (
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPU architecture */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the GPU architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the GPU architecture */,
  "memory" INTEGER /* Memory of the GPU in MB */,
  "clock_speed" REAL /* Clock speed of the GPU in GHz */,
  "architecture_type" TEXT /* Type of the GPU architecture (e.g., integrated, dedicated) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the GPU */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architecture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmarking test */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmarking test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmarking test */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the benchmarking test (e.g., FLOPS, memory bandwidth) */,
  "test_size" INTEGER /* Size of the benchmarking test */,
  "test_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, engineer) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmarking run */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking test */,
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPU architecture */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the benchmarking test */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the benchmarking test was run */,
  "run_time" TEXT /* Time when the benchmarking test was run */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the environment during the benchmarking test (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_architecture_id FOREIGN KEY ("architecture_id") REFERENCES gpu_architectures ("architecture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES benchmark_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Time when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_comments_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpu_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPU specification */,
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPU architecture */,
  "spec_name" TEXT /* Name of the GPU specification (e.g., memory, clock speed) */,
  "spec_value" TEXT /* Value of the GPU specification */,
  "spec_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the GPU specification (e.g., MB, GHz) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpu_specifications_architecture_id FOREIGN KEY ("architecture_id") REFERENCES gpu_architectures ("architecture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test specification */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking test */,
  "spec_name" TEXT /* Name of the test specification (e.g., test size, test type) */,
  "spec_value" TEXT /* Value of the test specification */,
  "spec_description" TEXT /* Description of the test specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_specifications_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES benchmark_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking result */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., 'good', 'improved') */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_tags_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking result */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., execution time, memory usage) */,
  "values" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_analytics_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system configuration */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking run */,
  "cpu_model" TEXT /* Model of the CPU */,
  "ram_size" INTEGER /* Size of the RAM in GB */,
  "storage_type" TEXT /* Type of the storage (e.g., HDD, SSD) */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used for the benchmarking run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_configurations_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES benchmark_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking run */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the environment during the benchmarking test */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity of the environment during the benchmarking test */,
  "noise_level" REAL /* Noise level of the environment during the benchmarking test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES benchmark_runs ("run_id")
)
